docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET OF TRAIL TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASIC, ALADIN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF BY PHONE. THE PLAINTIFF CALLED AND LEFT A MESSAGE INFORMING THE COURT THAT HE WAS UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFENDANT AND REQUEST TO DIMISS THE CASE. PLAINTIFF ALADIN MASIC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW KONOPKA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
